# Memory Log

Persistent knowledge base shared by all agents. Read this at the start of relevant tasks. Append entries when you discover bugs, make decisions, identify patterns, or learn lessons.

## Entry Format

| Date | Agent | Type | Description | Resolution |
| ---- | ----- | ---- | ----------- | ---------- |

Types: `DECISION`, `BUG`, `PATTERN`, `OUTCOME`, `LESSON`
